title: Star Wars: Essential Guides
content:
{{Top|rwm|leg|ref|italics=1}}
'''''Star Wars: Essential Guides''''' is a series of [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] reference books that were published by [[Del Rey]] from [[1995]] to [[2012]]. The series began with ''[[The Essential Guide to Characters]]'' and concluded with ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''.
